issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for invalid credentials, network failures, or rate limit scenarios.
The documentation contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Archive a Telegram channel with photos and videos
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Telethon's TelegramClient with iter_messages(limit=None) and isinstance checks on MessageMediaPhoto/MessageMediaDocument with mime_type filtering exactly as the skill specifies, plus the cryptg speedup hint; baseline reaches for Bot API or telegram-cli which cannot access non-bot channel history and misses the mime classification pattern.

scenarios.name: Extract shared URLs from a group over the last 6 months
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses iter_messages with offset_date/start_date filtering on msg.date as documented in Step 6, plus a regex over msg.text and a set for dedup as in the export_links.py example; baseline pages through getUpdates or uses Telegram Desktop export which the skill explicitly identifies as non-automatable.
